topic.title: Guest Speaker This Saturday — Dr. Maricla Pirozzi Quartey
topic.text:
INFO 7375 | March 14, 2026 | 12:00 PM ET

The idea isn't enough. The demo isn't enough. If you can't communicate it, none of it matters. Communication isn't a soft skill — it's your secret weapon.

This Saturday we welcome Dr. Maricla Pirozzi Quartey — Program Director at Northeastern's College of Engineering and the force behind INFO 7385: Managerial Communications for Engineers. Before NEU, she worked with engineers at Oracle, SAP, and Citrix, helping them translate brilliant ideas into language that executives, clients, and investors actually act on. She's a three-language, multi-country, doctorate-holding, award-winning mentor — and certified smarty pants — and she's here to talk about the skill that might matter more than any tool you build.

📷 Cameras ON. No exceptions. Here's why this matters beyond just our class: in Dr. Maricla's course, 50% of the grade is engagement — and cameras are on 100% of the time. That's not a coincidence. It's exactly what the corporate world expects. Saturday is great practice.

Come ready with your questions. This is going to be a great one.

See you Saturday! — Prof. Nik & Nina
